notes: Rest day. Large indulgent breakfast. Selective eating at lunch. Good TDEE day (2,652 kcal). Short sleep again (3h30m).

sleep.notes: 3h30m. Onset ~10:30PM. Blocks: ~10:30PM-12AM and ~1AM-3:30AM, with awakenings. Deep+Core+REM stages present. Short night despite reasonable onset time.

meals.description: Spicy chicken burrito (wrap, pilaf rice, spicy chicken, chickpea, cheese, onions, cucumber, pickles, volcano sauce, herb mayo) + nacho and cheese + banana pudding
Bulgogi chicken rice — 25% rice, 50% chicken, 1 fried egg, kimchi, some onions
